judge_note: same-vendor, different model — Haiku grading Sonnet is a floor on self-preference, not a cross-vendor check

caveats.L5_routing.agent: 0.919 = 68/74. The leg first ran 0.892 because two multistep items deadlocked and the harness timed them out; both pass in ~22s once parallel tool calls are off, and were re-scored individually rather than by re-running the whole leg. Stats items: 15/15.
caveats.rules_chunking: structural is saturated at 29/29 — the rules gold can no longer separate variants above this.
caveats.L6_judge: answerer and judge both changed model, so the 0.56->0.88 move mixes 'answers better' with 'grades itself differently'.
caveats.deadlock: Concurrent tool calls deadlocked the router — the model returns two tool_use blocks, pydantic-ai runs sync tools on threads, and our tools call run_sync inside. Fixed by parallel_tool_calls=False.

prompts: de-leaked — five gold questions were routing exemplars and four gold answers were named in the SQL prompt until this run

previous.note: measured before the answerer switched vendor and before the prompts were de-leaked; not comparable leg-for-leg
